messages.session_start_guidance: Open .copilot/workspace/HEARTBEAT.md and run the Checks section. Retrospective is optional: only run it when explicitly requested, or after a medium/large task once the user agrees.
messages.explicit_system: Heartbeat trigger detected. Run HEARTBEAT.md checks now. Retrospective is optional unless explicitly requested or the user agrees after a medium/large task.
messages.stop_prompt_question: That was a large change to the codebase, would you like me to run a retrospective?
messages.accepted_reason: The user agreed to a retrospective. Run HEARTBEAT.md Retrospective now, persist any insights, then stop normally.
